LightningComponentBundle.description: B2B Commerce storefront support cases list with Product column, priority/status badges, Open-a-case action, server-side sorting and pagination.

property.name: detailPageApiName
property.label: Case details page API name
property.description: API name of the Experience Builder page (URL /case-details) that hosts the Capsa B2B Case Details component. The case number links here.
